title: OPcraft
description: A mod with EXTREMELY OP Dimensions!
body: An **EXTREMELY OP** Mod for 1.12.2 that adds 4 dimensions, the least OP one is the OP Dimension, made up of 4 biomes. The OP Plains and Forest, The Golden Desert, an Irontartica. This is the least op as no mods really use diamonds and minerals in the hardest recipes. The other 3, the **sand**, **gravel**, and especially **clay** dimensions are **REALLY OP**, ruining **ALL MODPACK BALANCE** as you dont need **EFFORT** to obtain them
